# 📚 Docs: [What's Being Documented]

## 📝 Summary

<!-- เอกสารอะไรที่เพิ่ม/แก้? -->

## 🎯 Type

- [ ] New documentation
- [ ] Update existing
- [ ] Fix typos/grammar
- [ ] Restructure
- [ ] Translation
- [ ] Examples added
- [ ] Diagrams added

## 📚 Documentation Type (Diátaxis)

- [ ] 🎓 **Tutorial** — Learning-oriented (beginners)
- [ ] 🛠️ **How-to Guide** — Task-oriented (specific goal)
- [ ] 📖 **Reference** — Information-oriented (lookup)
- [ ] 💡 **Explanation** — Understanding-oriented (concepts)

## 👥 Target Audience

- [ ] External developers
- [ ] Internal team
- [ ] End users
- [ ] Operators / DevOps
- [ ] Executives

## ✅ Quality Checklist

### Content

- [ ] Accurate (verified against code/system)
- [ ] Complete (no missing critical info)
- [ ] Up-to-date (matches current version)
- [ ] Examples included
- [ ] Examples tested and work

### Writing Quality

- [ ] Clear and concise
- [ ] Active voice (mostly)
- [ ] Second person ("you" for user docs)
- [ ] Jargon explained or avoided
- [ ] Inclusive language

### Structure

- [ ] Clear title
- [ ] Logical flow
- [ ] Headings descriptive
- [ ] TOC for long docs
- [ ] Next steps at end

### Visuals

- [ ] Diagrams where helpful
- [ ] Screenshots up-to-date
- [ ] Code blocks have language tags
- [ ] Alt text on images

### Links

- [ ] Internal links work
- [ ] External links valid
- [ ] Cross-references added
- [ ] No broken links

## 🤖 Docs Writer Agent Review

**Verdict:** APPROVED / NEEDS_REVISION
**Diátaxis Alignment:** ✅
**Accessibility:** ✅
**Examples Tested:** ✅
